# Kingsway Electrical Contractors Ltd

> NAPIT-registered electrician based in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, serving Tunbridge Wells, Kent, London and East Sussex. Domestic and commercial electrical work, done safely, certified and left tidy.

Kingsway Electrical is a qualified, NAPIT-registered electrical contractor run by an electrician with over 10 years of experience across both domestic and commercial projects. Qualifications: NVQ Level 3, 18th Edition, AM2, and City & Guilds 2391 (Inspection and Testing). Also SMAS Worksafe accredited and a Dementia Friends supporter.

## Contact
- Phone: +44 7837 321291
- Email: info@kingsway-electrical.com
- Website: https://kingsway-electrical.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kingsway.electrical/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/1Cf3zeGQAm/

## Service area
- Based in Tunbridge Wells, Kent
- Covers Tunbridge Wells, Kent, London and East Sussex

## Pages
- [Home](https://kingsway-electrical.com/): overview, services, accreditations and contact
- [Residential / Domestic work](https://kingsway-electrical.com/residential.html): lighting, consumer units, EV chargers, sockets, outdoor lighting
- [Commercial / Industrial work](https://kingsway-electrical.com/commercial.html): power, containment, lighting, distribution boards

## Services
- Domestic electrical installations
- Commercial and industrial electrical work
- Interior and exterior lighting
- Consumer unit and fuseboard upgrades
- EV charger installation
- Full and partial rewires
- EICR inspection, testing and certification
- Fault finding, repairs and maintenance
